name: The Impact: Atlanta
overview: The Impact ATL." Featuring Jayda Cheaves, Ari Fletcher, Dionte "Arrogant Tae" Gray, Lakeyah, and Dess Dior, the forthcoming eight-episode docuseries will aim to highlight some of Atlanta's influential entrepreneurs and artists. The show was created in partnership with Entertainment One (eOne) and Quality Films, the film and television arm of Quality Control Music.
